summary: President Trump delivers remarks from a podium at the U.S.-Saudi Investment Forum 2025, touting growth in American-born employment and private-sector jobs versus the prior administration. Static single-camera podium framing with a long talking transcript; a plain speech excerpt, not produced or music-driven, so out of scope.
notable_text: U.S.-SAUDI INVESTMENT FORUM 2025; tweet quote: '1.9 million more American-born workers are employed today than when I took office.'
